# CWE-620: Unverified Password Change
lang: go
file: CWE-620-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Password string
}

// Vulnerable: password is replaced without verifying the current password.
func ChangePassword(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Username    string `json:"username"`
		NewPassword string `json:"new_password"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	db.Model(&Account{}).Where("username = ?", body.Username).Update("password", body.NewPassword)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
